---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that the extension doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches.

**Note**
Features must keep the extension private: no telemetry, no external requests, minimal
permissions. Requests that break this won't be accepted.
